title: Unexpected Cloud Access Event
description:
Cloud security telemetry shows external access to a restricted object in an S3 archive bucket.

Download the investigation pack and correlate CloudTrail events, S3 access logs, bucket-policy history, object inventory, identity activity, GuardDuty/Macie findings, and change-approval records to determine which CIA pillar was primarily impacted.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
